commit.message:
Fix compilation errors: missing returns, private fields, Iterator<T>, Continuation cast in HomeViewModel and FirstLoginViewModel

- Add emit+return and collect+return patterns in 7 HomeViewModel inner classes
- Add emit+return in FirstLoginViewModel refreshToken$1 and refreshTokenCEA$1
- Fix empty switch → recursive emit call in login$1 and getSessionFromApiAndSave$1
- Make HomeViewModel fields package-private: _listConfigSession, _message, sessionRepository, sessionHistoricRecordPermissionsChangeRepository, listClasType
- Fix Iterator<T> → raw Iterator in refreshTokenCEA$1
- Fix Continuation<?> cast in getSessionByFilterChip$1

Add priority, note, and URL fields to create and edit

All three are parsed from the natural-language options string alongside
date and repeat. note must appear last — it captures everything after it
to end of string, so no escaping is needed for free text.

  reminders create "Pay rent" march 1 repeat monthly priority high note pay via bank
  reminders edit "Call dentist" friday url https://dentist.com note ask about X-rays

- OptionsParsing.swift added to RemindersLib with ParsedOptions and parseOptions()
- parsePriority() in main.swift maps high/medium/low/none to EKReminder values
- 125 tests, all passing

docs: update storage guidance — blob storage now works on prod

Prod storage account (stariaprodhw63c3) is not affected by the
MCAPS governance policy that disabled publicNetworkAccess on the
dev account. Blob storage is fully operational for new features.

Updated CLAUDE.md to remove "DO NOT USE" warning and offer both
blob and DB storage as valid options. Updated AGENTS.md migration
notes on bug fixes #10, #16, #20 to reflect stable prod storage.

upload/retrieval all return 200 on prod.

fix: resolve CI failures — bump MSRV to 1.83, fix clippy lints, run cargo fmt

Cargo.lock v4 (generated by Rust 1.93) is incompatible with the previous
MSRV of 1.75. Bumping to 1.83 also enables the is_multiple_of() method
required by a new clippy lint.

with echo, tremolo, pink noise, EQ) mixed at 35% under avatar voices.
No more Alex voice bleeding into BGM.

fix: discover Godot project root in subdirectories

before resolving the backend, preventing failed Godot LSP launches.

commit.message:
Fix seed hex not showing at wallet creation

- Add localSeedHex state to store seedHex immediately from createWalletV2 result
- Pass localSeedHex || recoveryCode to WalletReadyScreen
- Clear localSeedHex when clearing recovery code
- Add debug logging to trace recoveryCode propagation
- Add EVM button click debug logging

The issue was that context state updates are async, so recoveryCode
from context wasn't available when WalletReadyScreen first rendered.
By storing the seedHex in local state synchronously before navigation,
it's now available on the first render.

Bypass SGO rate limit during pro trial (unlimited calls)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Wrap startup DB block in try/except to survive IPv6 failures on Render

Render free tier can't reach Supabase's IPv6 address during gunicorn's
import phase, causing the deploy to crash. Wrapping db.create_all() and
migrations in try/except lets the app start — tables already exist, and
SQLAlchemy creates per-request connections once workers are running.

Add missing date_of_birth column to waitlist table

commit.message:
Strip changelog version header from GitHub release notes (#965)

## Summary

- **Removed duplicate version header from GitHub release notes body**.
`extract_changelog_section` was including the `## [vX.Y.Z] - Date`
header line in the notes, causing it to render redundantly since GitHub
releases already display a separate title (`v9.6.1`). Now skips the
header line and returns only the section content.

## Test plan

- [x] `bundle exec rubocop rakelib/release.rake` passes
- [ ] Verify with `rake "sync_github_release[9.6.1,true]"` dry run
- [ ] Re-sync v9.6.1 release after merging: `rake
"sync_github_release[9.6.1]"`

commit.message:
Fix vision resize threshold to account for base64 encoding overhead

The API enforces 5 MB on the base64-encoded payload, not raw bytes.
Base64 inflates size by ~33%, so use 3.75 MB raw threshold to ensure
encoded data stays under the 5 MB limit.

commit.message:
Add /skill command for managing skills in interactive mode (#69)

* [STRUCTURAL] Add SkillSummary type and GetAllSkillSummaries to Runtime

Adds a lightweight SkillSummary type and a GetAllSkillSummaries() method
to the skill Runtime. This provides the /skill slash command (coming next)
with the data it needs to list all discovered skills with their current
state, without exposing full manifests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [BEHAVIORAL] Add /skill command with list, activate, deactivate subcommands

Adds a /skill slash command to the commands package with three subcommands:
- /skill list (default) — lists all discovered skills with state
- /skill activate <name> — activates a skill
- /skill deactivate <name> — deactivates a skill

Uses a SkillLister interface to break the import cycle (skills imports
commands, so commands cannot import skills). Tab completion returns
subcommand names and skill names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [BEHAVIORAL] Wire /skill command into interactive mode startup

Registers the /skill command in the TUI's command registry when a skill
runtime is available. Adds a skillListerAdapter that bridges the
skills.Runtime API to the commands.SkillLister interface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [STRUCTURAL] Add RegisterAllFull using full instruction skill parser

Adds RegisterAllFull to the frontmatter package, which uses
ParseInstructionSkill() instead of the local Parse(). This supports
the complete SKILL.md frontmatter schema including commands, agents,
triggers, and permissions.

Includes injectDefaultVersion helper so built-in skills can omit the
version field while still passing manifest validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [STRUCTURAL] Migrate superpowers to RegisterAllFull

Switches superpowers from the legacy RegisterAll (name + description only)
to RegisterAllFull which supports the complete SKILL.md frontmatter schema.
Existing tests pass unchanged — this is a pure parser upgrade.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [STRUCTURAL] Migrate frontenddesign to RegisterAllFull

Switches frontenddesign from the legacy RegisterAll to RegisterAllFull.
The extra license field in the SKILL.md frontmatter is silently ignored
by the non-strict parser. Existing tests pass unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [STRUCTURAL] Remove unused legacy frontmatter.RegisterAll and Parse

Remove Fields type, Parse function, and RegisterAll function that used
the limited name/description-only parser. All callers now use
RegisterAllFull which supports the complete SKILL.md frontmatter schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [BEHAVIORAL] Add slash commands to superpowers skills

Add commands to 6 user-invocable workflow skills: /plan, /brainstorm,
/tdd, /review, /debug, /finish. Meta/reference skills (using-superpowers,
writing-skills, etc.) intentionally left without commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [BEHAVIORAL] Add /design command to frontend-design skill

Register /design slash command so users can invoke the frontend design
skill directly from the command line.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [STRUCTURAL] Scope injectDefaultVersion check to frontmatter block only

The version field check previously scanned the entire file including the
markdown body, which could produce false positives if the body contained
a line starting with "version:". Now the check is constrained to the
content between the opening and closing "---" markers.

Also adds tests for preserved explicit version and version text in body.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [BEHAVIORAL] Improve /skill command formatting and completion filtering

- Use text/tabwriter for column-aligned skill list output, handling
  skill names of any length correctly.
- Filter tab completion: /skill activate shows only inactive skills,
  /skill deactivate shows only active skills.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [BEHAVIORAL] Add unit tests for skillListerAdapter

Tests verify field mapping (Name, Description, Source→string,
State→String()), Activate/Deactivate delegation, and error propagation
for not-found and not-active cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat: quantum-enhanced worker dispatch + evolution fitness tracking

Port swarm-core algorithms into native Rust for BUNNY's edge orchestration:

- quantum_dispatch.rs: Qutrit-based worker selection using 3-qutrit state
  vector (dim=27) with Hadamard + phase gates. Composite scoring with
  quantum tie-breaking when candidates are within 5% fitness.
- evolution.rs: EMA-based worker fitness tracker (success rate, latency,
  experience). Enables adaptive worker selection favoring consistently
  high-performing edge nodes.
- coordinator.rs: Enhanced try_dispatch() with quantum-enhanced selection
  when multiple workers match. handle_result() feeds evolution tracker.
  Added record_failure() for timeout/error telemetry.

37/37 bunny-network tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: save bar jiggle, API 401 retry, reset-to-defaults, KG styling

1. Save bar: slides in/out with CSS transition instead of being
   conditionally rendered. No more layout jiggle.

2. API auth: both api() functions (shared + local) now retry once
   on HTTP 401 by re-fetching the bootstrap token. Fixes race
   condition where token isn't ready on first page load.

3. Reset to defaults: new "Werkseinstellungen" button in System
   page with double confirmation (danger modal). Resets cfg to
   defaults() without touching saved API keys or data.

4. Knowledge Graph: improved search/filter styling for light mode,
   better graph container contrast, focus ring on inputs.

commit.message:
fix textarea not filling height on desktop

textarea has an intrinsic height (from default rows=2) that desktop
browsers respect even with flex:1 + min-height:0. Adding height:0
removes the intrinsic size so flex-grow fully controls the height.

Initial commit: CipherVault - CLI Secrets Manager

Rust CLI secrets manager with AES-256-GCM authenticated encryption
and Argon2id key derivation.

Features:
- AES-256-GCM with random salt (32B) + nonce (12B) per operation
- Argon2id memory-hard key derivation from master password
- SQLite vault with secure_delete and WAL mode
- CRUD, search, categories, stats, encrypted export
- Zeroize on drop for key material and secrets
- 19 unit tests across crypto, db, vault layers
- Multi-stage Docker build with non-root user
- GitHub Actions CI (build, test, clippy)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
